title: How to Use Claude Design – Full AI Design Workflow 2026
summary: Claude Design is an AI design tool that replaces manual design work and Figma for generating branded landing pages and design systems. The tutorial demonstrates a 4-step workflow including design system building, asset generation, editing, and template deployment with token management guidance.
writeup: This tutorial from AI Master covers Claude Design, an AI design tool positioned to replace manual design work and Figma for generating branded landing pages and design systems. It walks through a four-step workflow: building the design system, generating assets, editing, and deploying templates, with guidance on managing tokens. The takeaway is a concrete end-to-end process for producing branded design output without traditional design software.
